results.title: 9LivesData appoints Data Sciences Corporation as distributor of high9stor across SA
results.description: Under the agreement, Data Sciences Corporation will lead go-to-market, channel enablement and post-sales support for high9stor – including the new H9S-100 platform.

results.title: Macquarie Group (ASX:MQG): Why Is It a Financial Mood Gauge?
results.description: Macquarie Group is in focus as financial stocks face a sharper ASX test around deal activity and asset management depth.

results.title: DVC's CTPS Emerges as Top Central Sector Thermal Power Plant in PLF for March 2026
results.description: Damodar Valley Corporation's Chandrapura Thermal Power Station recorded the highest Plant Load Factor among Central Sector thermal power stations in March 2026.

results.title: Where does Cape Coral rank for good, bad places to rent in the U.S.?
results.description: WalletHub compared more than 180 rental markets, including Cape Coral, based on 21 key measures of rental attractiveness and quality of life.

results.title: India's IPO Market Heats Up Again | 258 Companies Await SEBI Green Light | ₹3.27 Lkh Cr IPO Pipeline
results.description: India's primary market continues to remain active with a robust IPO pipeline. Around 258 companies with valid SEBI approvals are collectively looking to raise an estimated ₹3.27 lakh crore through public issues. The video also tracks the IPO trends in CY2026, highlights the biggest upcoming listings, and explains why pre-IPO placements are making a strong comeback as companies tap institutional investors ahead of their market debut. Catch Sakshi Batra in conversation with Pranav Haldea, Managing Director, PRIME Database Group decoding on what's driving India's next wave of IPOs.
